title: [IOS] Location sharing dialogue - Allow While Using App is selected
scenario: User selects "Allow While Using App" for location permission and expects no further location consent prompts during the session or after app restart.
steps: Open the app and navigate to the location sharing dialogue.
Select 'Allow While Using App' from the location sharing options.
Observe that the FMD screen loads without any additional location consent prompt.
Observe that the app does not ask for location permission again.
expected: After selecting "Allow While Using App", the FMD screen loads without re-prompting for location consent. After restarting the app, the user is not asked again for location permission.
